title: Proven reoffending statistics by index disposal ad hoc, Wales
body: "This ad hoc statistical release includes reoffending data on offenders with a last known address in Wales, who were released from custody, received a non-custodial conviction, or a caution in the cohorts between April-June 2020 and July-September 2023. The ad hoc is being published to allow the Minister to respond to an ask for unpublished data tabled at the Criminal Justice Session in July 2025  Pre-release access The bulletin was produced and handled by the Ministry’s analytical professionals and production staff. Pre-release access of up to 24 hours was granted to the following persons: Deputy Director, Analysis; Press officers (x4); Analysts (x4) "
